issues.claim: Verse supports chapter 4 thesis at appropriate thread
issues.objection: 4.22 sits in thread 2 (action-without-bondage) of the chapter-4 thesis; the engineering layer remains anchored to that thread. The chapter's voice transition (cosmic 4.1-4.10 → operational 4.11+) is honored — 4.22 is firmly in the operational register, with STRETCHED tagging honest where the verse reaches into the metaphysical (4.24 brahman-everywhere, 4.36-4.37 fire-of-knowledge metaphor).

notes: 4.22 supports the chapter-4 thesis: right-action that does not bind. PASS.
